echo (Energy and Commodity Holistic Optimiser)

  • View page source

echo.echo_builder module

class echo.echo_builder.NetworkSet(description, name='default_name')

Bases: object

A network set is a grouping of separate network pieces that we want to be able to optimise/analyse as a group. The networks in a network set must have the same interval duration and time periods. This class can be used to manage single networks too, if useful.

add_network(network: dict)
add_networks_from_list(networks: list)
export_results_to_df()
get_echo_model(network_name: str)

Returns an echo model of a network in the network set

get_echo_optimiser(network_name: str)

Returns the echo optimiser for a network in the network set

optimise_network_set(log_file=None, verbose=False)
echo.echo_builder.append_results(result_dict, network_dict, in_place=False)

Takes dict of results from an echo model, and appends them to the correct places in a network dict.

echo.echo_builder.array_length_check(array, length, message, scalar_ok=False)
echo.echo_builder.check_nx_for_floating_nodes(g)

Checks if we have nodes without any edge

echo.echo_builder.check_port_names_are_consistent(g)
echo.echo_builder.combine_two_graphs(g1, g2, p1=None, p2=None)

Takes two networkx graphs and combines them, returning the combination as a third graph

echo.echo_builder.connect_nodes(system, node1, node2, port1, port2)
echo.echo_builder.construct_echo_node(system, node_name_dict, node, node_dict, df)

Does logic for workingout which type of node to build. Builds it and updates the echo graph, as well as the node name map.

echo.echo_builder.convert_dict_to_nx(netw_jsn: dict, verbose: bool = True)

Creates nx graph from network dictionary

echo.echo_builder.convert_nx_to_echo(g, df, verbose=True)

Creates echo model from nx graph

echo.echo_builder.convert_objective_to_echo_objective(em, node_name_dict: dict, objective_dict: dict, verbose: bool = True)
echo.echo_builder.create_battery_node(node_dict)
echo.echo_builder.create_demand_tariff(tariff_dict, node_name_dict, em)

echo.echo_builder.create_export_tariff(tariff_dict, node_name_dict, em)
echo.echo_builder.create_flex_node(node_dict)
echo.echo_builder.create_import_tariff(tariff_dict, node_name_dict, em)
echo.echo_builder.create_inverter_node(inverter_dict)
echo.echo_builder.create_load_node(load_dict, df)
echo.echo_builder.create_peak_power_objective(tariff_dict, node_name_dict, em)
echo.echo_builder.create_quadratic_objective(tariff_dict, node_name_dict, em)
echo.echo_builder.create_solar_node(solar_dict, df)
echo.echo_builder.create_tellegen_node(node_dict)
echo.echo_builder.create_throughput_tariff(tariff_dict, node_name_dict, em)
echo.echo_builder.extract_results(optimiser, node_name_dict: dict, results_key: Optional[dict] = None)

Extracts results from an echo model and returns them in a dict. Results key arg allows user to specify which results they want returned.

echo.echo_builder.get_echo_port_units(node_name, port_unit)

echo.echo_builder.get_pyomo_vars_from_port_name(port_name, map)

echo.echo_builder.retrieve_value(dict, key)
